name: Homeowners Association Tax Election

eligibility.description: Available to condominium management, residential real estate, or timeshare associations where 60% of income is from dues/fees and 90% of expenses are for association property maintenance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows HOAs to elect to be treated as tax-exempt organizations, whereby membership dues, fees, and assessments (exempt function income) are excluded from gross income.
